points.text: Enable detailed timing logs around checkout API and DB query; capture start/end timestamps and query execution plan.
Run EXPLAIN on the new join, add missing indexes or rewrite the query (or split into multiple queries) to reduce execution time.
Make the payment step idempotent by using a unique transaction token or DB lock so retries cannot create duplicate charges.
Run EXPLAIN ANALYZE on the new join query; identify missing indexes or costly scans causing 5‑10 s latency.
Check transaction isolation (e.g., REPEATABLE READ) and lock ordering to prevent race conditions that lead to double charges.
Add a unique constraint or idempotency key on payments and implement exponential back‑off retries to avoid duplicate inserts.
Add a unique, database‑enforced transaction identifier and reject duplicate submissions to prevent double charges.
Profile the new join query; check execution plan and add needed indexes to reduce lock time and eliminate contention.
Replace blind client retries with exponential back‑off and server‑side idempotency token so retries don’t create extra orders.
